---
title: "Quiet as the Forest · Areas"
listing:
  contents: "areas/*-en.{qmd,md}"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  image-placeholder: profile.png
  fields: [image, date, title, description, reading-time, categories] # 显式指定显示哪些元素
  image-height: 200px  # 建议固定一个高度，让网格更整齐
# 【强烈建议加上这行】让网格布局铺满屏幕
page-layout: full
---

Areas (English): translated notes about long-term areas of focus. Place `-en` files in `areas/`.
